Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.RecordWritable

Packages that use RecordWritable
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
Public low-level token-streaming API (pull parser + push generator) shared by every Juneau format.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to BSON (Binary JSON).
    static class 
    BsonSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    static class 
    BsonSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
    class 
    BsonSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of BsonSerializer.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to CBOR (RFC 8949).
    static class 
    CborSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    static class 
    CborSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
    class 
    CborSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CborSerializer.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CsvSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to CSV (Comma Separated Values) format.
    class 
    CsvSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CsvSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HjsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Hjson (Human JSON).
    class 
    HjsonSerializerSession
    Session for serializing objects to Hjson format.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HoconSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation).
    class 
    HoconSerializerSession
    Session for serializing objects to HOCON format.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HtmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as HTML documents.
    class 
    HtmlDocSerializerSession
    Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of HtmlSerializer and its subclasses.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaDocSerializerSession
    Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of HtmlSchemaDocSerializer and its subclasses.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metamodels to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.Simple
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode.
    static class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializer.SimpleReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
    class 
    HtmlSchemaSerializerSession
    Context object that lives for the duration of a single serialization of HtmlSchemaSerializer and its subclasses.
    class 
    HtmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to HTML.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    HtmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
    class 
    HtmlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of HtmlSerializer.
    class 
    HtmlStrippedDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as stripped HTML.
    class 
    HtmlStrippedDocSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of HtmlStrippedDocSerializer.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    IniSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to INI format.
    class 
    IniSerializerSession
    Session for serializing objects to INI format.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JcsSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to canonical JSON per RFC 8785 (JCS).
    class 
    JcsSerializerSession
    Session object for JcsSerializer that produces RFC 8785 canonical JSON.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonSchemaSerializer
    Serializes POJO metadata to HTTP responses as JSON-Schema.
    static class 
    JsonSchemaSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    class 
    JsonSchemaSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSchemaSerializer.
    class 
    JsonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to RFC 8259 JSON.
    static class 
    JsonSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    class 
    JsonSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonSerializer.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Json5Serializer
    Serializes POJO models to Simplified JSON.
    static class 
    Json5Serializer.Readable
    Default serializer, single quotes, simple mode, with whitespace.
    class 
    Json5SerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Json5Serializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MarkdownDocSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown document mode (headings + tables).
    class 
    MarkdownDocSerializerSession
    Session object for MarkdownDocSerializer.
    class 
    MarkdownSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to Markdown (fragment mode: tables and lists).
    class 
    MarkdownSerializerSession
    Session object for MarkdownSerializer.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MsgPackSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to MessagePack.

    MsgPackSerializer.Base64
    Default serializer, BASE64 string output.
    static class 
    MsgPackSerializer.SpacedHex
    Default serializer, spaced-hex string output.
    class 
    MsgPackSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MsgPackSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    OpenApiSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to values suitable for transmission as HTTP headers, query/form-data parameters, and path variables.
    class 
    OpenApiSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of OpenApiSerializer.

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ParquetSerializer
    Serializes bean collections to Apache Parquet binary format.
    class 
    ParquetSerializerSession
    Session for ParquetSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    PlainTextSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to plain text using just the toString() method on the serialized object.
    class 
    PlainTextSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of PlainTextSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SoapXmlSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML+SOAP.
    class 
    SoapXmlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SoapXmlSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SseSerializer
    Serializes SseEvent objects to the text/event-stream wire format defined by the WHATWG Server-Sent Events spec.
    class 
    SseSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of SseSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream

    Subinterfaces of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    TokenWritable
    Capability role for serializers that additionally expose the structural TokenWriter cursor (FULL formats: json, json5, jsonl, cbor, msgpack, jsonschema, jcs).

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    TomlSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to TOML v1.0.0 format.
    class 
    TomlSerializerSession
    Session for serializing objects to TOML format.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UonSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to UON (a notation for URL-encoded query parameter values).
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Encoding
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().encoding().build();.
    static class 
    UonSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UonSerializer.create().ws().build();.
    class 
    UonSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UonSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to URL-encoded notation with UON-encoded values (a notation for URL-encoded query paramter values).
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Expanded
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().expandedParams().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.PlainText
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().plainTextParts().build();.
    static class 
    UrlEncodingSerializer.Readable
    Equivalent to UrlEncodingSerializer.create().useWhitespace().build();.
    class 
    UrlEncodingSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of UrlEncodingSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    XmlDocSerializer
    Serializes POJOs to HTTP responses as XML.
    static class 
    XmlDocSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    class 
    XmlDocSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlDocSerializer.
    class 
    XmlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to XML.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Ns
    Default serializer without namespaces.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSq
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.NsSqReadable
    Default serializer without namespaces, single quotes, with whitespace.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.Sq
    Default serializer, single quotes.
    static class 
    XmlSerializer.SqReadable
    Default serializer, single quotes, whitespace added.
    class 
    XmlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of XmlSerializer.

  • Uses of RecordWritable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml that implement RecordWritable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    YamlSerializer
    Serializes POJO models to YAML.
    static class 
    YamlSerializer.Readable
    Default serializer, with whitespace.
    class 
    YamlSerializerSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of YamlSerializer.
